reviews.review_description: How do you get game to start don't see no start or play button

developer_response.body: in the menu. it says START, once pressed a cupe appears allowing you to play. You point your hand to the desired button and then you click your trigger or index button.

reviews.review_title: Play the game to make it popular again
reviews.review_description: After the hack incident the game died but you can help by getting this game and playing it and the more people say and promote it the more people we can get then it won’t be boring because no one is playing it will be fun

reviews.review_title: Why I should be a admin
reviews.review_description: I really do like this game and and is a super fun game.  I think I’d be a good admin because I’m nice, fair, and helpful. I’d make sure everyone has fun, follows the rules, and stays safe online.

developer_response.body: Make sure to join the Discord, if you can. We are promoting admins/moderators since we do kinda need the game to be more safe/fun/active, add "mcvrsupport" and ask if you can be moderator/admin, if you dont have Discord then you can add me on Meta.

reviews.review_description: Game is supper good yall need to try it out
The owner is really nice most of the time but sometimes he gets a little mad, but I’m OK with it but I definitely recommend

developer_response.body: Sorry, i have anger issues. I'm working on it, i'm happy you enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: The owner isn't a  bad person those allegations are NOT true he has been in some scrapples but that's nothing horrible for his community or himself. So if you do see this get the game it's pretty fun but kinda inactive forest is the laggy map although really fun

developer_response.body:
Thank you! :D
thanks for the feedback :D

reviews.review_description: Play game good owner good discord server
Skibidy
hi
The owner used to be nice now hes a jerk
Fier
The game and community is good but if you get to know the owner, you’ll realize that he does despicable things. I can confirm, I am traumatized by him.

reviews.review_title: This is the best game ever
reviews.review_description: The owner is kind and the game is really fun. It’s a game where you could vibe play Have fun explore it has so much to offer don’t listen to the one star reviews. All of the one star reviews are absolute lies
The owner has doxed multiple people and grabbed their IPs as an ex mod I've heard him leak IPs and say full names don't download the game

developer_response.body: I've Never Said Someones "REAL"Name, Stop Lying. Plus I WAS INNOCENT WHILE I WAS BEING PRETTY MUCH HARASSED, you did this, you terrible person. You just like making nice people's games worse, what is wrong with you. GUYS DONT LISTEN TO THEM THEY ARE LIARS! (i am NOT asking for drama, if you make drama i just wont respond to it as i am completely chill, just an innocent person now.) (dont try modding since we have Copyright.) How would i even know your  real name.. Start thinking more

reviews.review_description: I used to like the game but I keep getting kicked from something also the owner is racist and keeps saying the n word please don’t install

developer_response.body: First Of All, I am Not Racist. Someone Used An AI Voice Thing To Copy My Voice. And I Do Not Even Know Who You Are In The Game Have You Ever Heard Of "MODDERS" Which We Are Fixing.

reviews.review_description: The owner has your ip and threatens to use it  says the n word a lot and uses his friends/mods only play if u want to be doxxed

developer_response.body: Absolutely not true. Never said the N Word, why would i use my friend and why would i mod my own game? Common sense.

reviews.review_description: This game has really nice textures you can find eggs the have a season pass something many games don’t have
This game is so good just join and you will see for yourself
My friend is mod in game 👍
Best game but some lags

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are fixing the lag :D

reviews.review_description: I played your game but there was like a problem. The first time I joined there was nobody the other time I joined there were two people in the lobby, but they kicked me off the server so can you please not add that(put that doesn’t mean I don’t love your game )😆

developer_response.body: Sorry, the people who kicked you were most likely modders. We have fixed it so now you wont get kicked by people, have fun!

reviews.review_description: It’s so good updates 3 times a day (sometimes) but still a good game the owner does not dox people or has never called anyone the n word or the b word those reviews are just lies and you can’t pull peoples ips with the game you need a different thing so don’t worry the game won’t dox you
This is the best some reason they haven't  update but this is Best game😃😃

The game has so much content that so many people should make videos on it! Gorilla tag is now boring, but this game is better than every fangame I played! (btw you should optimise the game a little bit 😄)
I love the mod menu, however could I be a moderater? I would ban toxic and yeah, recommend this game
